examples: Time, surely, to put social inclusion before defiant decadence.
I said earlier that the decadence of our language is probably curable.
The perfume represented prewar decadence, glamour and good times in a bottle.
Throughout the years, Miami's reputation as a city of decadence has played a number of starring roles.
Based on a true story, though its moldy glamour-of-decadence mood comes straight from the movies.
